objective: Produce the first verified customer by attracting MCP and agent builders with an immediately useful free preflight.

primary_offer.buyer: An MCP or agent team preparing a public launch or external connection
primary_offer.free_value: A deterministic browser-based public-metadata readiness report
primary_offer.paid_outcome: An authorized full launch audit with prioritized findings

funnel.mechanism: Truthful listings and contributions in developer channels that explicitly accept MCP tooling
Visitor runs a public repository preflight and receives prioritized launch actions
The result URL preserves the repository and referral attribution for team review
Tracked Buy full audit - $149 CTA opens the configured public Stripe checkout
Only an owner-verified Stripe transaction is recorded as revenue

first_distribution_target.audience: MCP builders actively looking for development and testing tools
first_distribution_target.submission_route: Pull request under the repository's published contribution rules

measurement.repository_attention: GitHub Traffic API views, clones, and referrers over its retained window
measurement.checkout_attribution: Stripe Payment Link UTM parameters inherited from the preflight URL
measurement.qualified_interest: Project issue intake remains a non-revenue signal

pre_distribution_baseline.clone_interpretation: Not counted as qualified traffic because repository automation and human buyer intent cannot be separated.
